title: AI_OS Canonical Orchestration Packet
description: Foundation schema stub for the one canonical AI_OS packet contract. This file defines the stable work request a worker, validator, dashboard, and approval gate can all understand.

schema.description: Identifies this object as the canonical AI_OS orchestration packet.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema contract, such as 1.0.0.

packet_id.description: Stable unique packet identifier used by queues, workers, approvals, locks, validators, and dashboards.

mode.description: Current operating mode. DRY_RUN means inspect, plan, and validate only.

status.description: Canonical lifecycle status such as QUEUED, ASSIGNED, DRY_RUN_COMPLETE, BLOCKED, or REVIEW_REQUIRED.

scope.description: Allowed and blocked paths/actions for this packet.

safety.description: Safety flags for approvals, APPLY, commit, push, secrets, broker access, and live trading boundaries.

validators.description: Validator contracts required for this packet.

next_safe_action.description: Exact next operator-safe action after reading this packet.
